label: Regulatory
blurb: Live regulatory threats on the footprint. Click a pin for the DKK impact band.

markers.label: EU tobacco-tax revision
markers.detail: Proposal, in Council negotiation. Would raise excise minimums on cigars/cigarillos/pipe from a proposed 2028 (pouch minima phase 2030–2032). Reaches the cigar & pipe core. → opens the Impact Room.

markers.label: France oral-nicotine ban
markers.detail: Total ban on oral nicotine, in force Apr 2026 (Conseil d'État merits ruling expected H2 2026). Forecloses France as an XQS pouch growth market. The French machine-rolled cigar core (~DKK 620m*) is a separate exposure this ban does not touch. → opens the Impact Room.

markers.label: Denmark 9mg + flavour cap
markers.detail: 9 mg/pouch cap + tobacco/menthol-only flavours (full effect Apr 2026). Delists XQS's flavour-led range in the home market. → opens the Impact Room.

markers.label: Spain 0.99mg cap (proposed)
markers.detail: Proposed 0.99 mg/pouch cap would foreclose standard pouches. Sweden has formally objected.

markers.label: US handmade tariff lines
markers.detail: Tariffs on handmade cigar imports (DR/HN/NI). Regime in flux — treat as a scenario variable.
